place.summary: Ngong Ping Village functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Ngong Ping 360. Visitors often continue to Po Lin Monastery. It performs above its category average on observed experience.

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Po Lin Monastery
opportunity_cards.detail: Ngong Ping Village frequently appears alongside Po Lin Monastery, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: Strong onward link to Po Lin Monastery
opportunity_cards.detail: Visitors often continue from Ngong Ping Village to Po Lin Monastery, with relatively strong journey experience.

journey_examples.trajectory: Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge -> Ngong Ping Village
